drivers.notes: Neodymium magnet system; new fifth-generation low-resonance midwoofer

description.en: Fifth-generation Guarneri — flagship two-way standmount of the Homage Collection, named after the Cremonese luthiers. Extended-range soft-dome tweeter and a new low-resonance 150 mm midwoofer in a violin-curve cabinet of high-gloss lacquered wood, leather, aluminium and carbon-fibre stand. 'Stealth Ultraflex' vented loading.
description.es: Quinta generación del Guarneri — bookshelf insignia de dos vías de la Homage Collection, nombrado por el luthier cremonés. Tweeter de domo blando Extended Range y nuevo midwoofer de baja resonancia de 150 mm en un gabinete con curvas de violín en madera lacada de alto brillo, cuero, aluminio y stand de fibra de carbono. Carga vented 'Stealth Ultraflex'.
